description: Create the @quant/ar-lenses package with tracking abstraction, overlay engine, lens format, generative lenses, ethical filter design, and cross-app distribution. This is a full package implementation following the patterns established by @quant/spatial-ui and @quant/generative-media.
steps: Create packages/ar-lenses/package.json with name @quant/ar-lenses, same structure as packages/spatial-ui/package.json (private, type module, vitest, tsc, eslint scripts)
Create packages/ar-lenses/tsconfig.json matching the spatial-ui tsconfig (ES2022, ESNext, bundler, strict, composite, etc.)

Create src/types.ts with all interfaces: FaceLandmark (468 points), FaceExpression, HandLandmark (21 points per hand), HandGestureAR, BodyPose (33 points), TrackingFrame, PlatformAdapter, Overlay2D, Overlay3D, ParticleSystem, LightingEffect, LensDefinition (triggers, effects, parameters), LensRuntime config, EffectPipeline, GenerativeLensRequest, StyleTransferConfig, BackgroundReplacement, EthicsPolicy, ConsentRecord, DeepfakeMarker, CrossAppTarget, DistributionManifest
Create src/tracking/face-tracker.ts - FaceTracker class: detectFace(frame) returning 468 landmarks + expressions, platform-agnostic with adapter injection, confidence thresholds, multi-face support

Create src/tracking/hand-tracker-ar.ts - HandTrackerAR class: detectHands(frame) returning 21 landmarks per hand + gesture classification, extends concepts from spatial-ui but focused on camera-feed AR (not XR headset)
Create src/tracking/body-tracker.ts - BodyTracker class: detectPose(frame) returning 33 body landmarks, full/upper body modes, multi-person tracking
Create src/tracking/platform-adapter.ts - Abstract PlatformAdapter interface and concrete MediaPipeAdapter, ARKitAdapter, ARCoreAdapter implementations that normalize tracking data
Create src/overlay/overlay-2d.ts - Overlay2DEngine class: render stickers/text/filters onto tracking anchors, z-ordering, opacity blending, animation keyframes
Create src/overlay/overlay-3d.ts - Overlay3DEngine class: face mesh deformation, 3D accessory placement (hats, glasses, masks), transform matrices relative to face/body landmarks
Create src/overlay/particles.ts - ParticleSystem class: emit/update/render particles (confetti, sparkles, fire), physics simulation (gravity, wind), lifetime management, burst/continuous modes
Create src/overlay/effects.ts - LightingEffects class: color grading, vignette, bloom, face relighting, background blur
Create src/lens/lens-schema.ts - LensSchema class: validate lens definitions (triggers like face-detect/smile/blink, effect chains, parameter ranges), serialize/deserialize, version compatibility

Create src/lens/lens-runtime.ts - LensRuntime class: execute lens within sandbox constraints (resource limits, no network, restricted APIs), frame-by-frame effect pipeline execution, performance budgets (16ms target)
Create src/lens/effect-pipeline.ts - EffectPipeline class: chain multiple effects in order, pass data between stages, short-circuit on tracking loss, performance monitoring
Create src/generative/prompt-to-lens.ts - PromptToLens class: take natural language description, map to lens schema (effect selection, parameter tuning, trigger assignment), validate output
Create src/generative/style-transfer.ts - StyleTransfer class: apply artistic style to face region only (mask face, apply style, composite back), style presets, intensity control
Create src/generative/background-replace.ts - BackgroundReplacer class: segment person from background, replace with generated/static backgrounds, edge refinement, temporal consistency
Create src/ethics/body-filter-guard.ts - BodyFilterGuard class: detect and block body-shaming filters (weight manipulation, skin lightening, body proportion changes), configurable policy
Create src/ethics/age-gate.ts - AgeGate class: enforce age-appropriate filtering, block mature effects for minors, parental controls, content rating system
Create src/ethics/consent-manager.ts - ConsentManager class: track consent for AR capture/sharing, per-person consent in multi-face, revocation, audit trail

Create src/ethics/deepfake-marker.ts - DeepfakeMarker class: embed invisible and visible markers in all AR content (C2PA-compatible), tamper detection, verification API. Uses pattern from generative-media C2PAStamper.

Create src/distribution/cross-app.ts - CrossAppDistributor class: register lens for use across QuantNeon stories, QuantChat video calls, QuantMax random video, QuantMeet meetings. Capability negotiation per app context.
Create src/index.ts barrel file exporting all types and classes
Create src/__tests__/tracking.test.ts - tests for FaceTracker, HandTrackerAR, BodyTracker (landmark counts, confidence thresholds, multi-face/person, adapter integration)
Create src/__tests__/overlay.test.ts - tests for Overlay2DEngine, Overlay3DEngine, ParticleSystem, LightingEffects (render outputs, z-ordering, particle lifecycle, effect application)
Create src/__tests__/lens.test.ts - tests for LensSchema validation, LensRuntime execution within budget, EffectPipeline chaining and short-circuit behavior
Create src/__tests__/generative.test.ts - tests for PromptToLens mapping, StyleTransfer face-region masking, BackgroundReplacer segmentation
Create src/__tests__/ethics.test.ts - tests for BodyFilterGuard blocking harmful filters, AgeGate enforcement, ConsentManager audit trail, DeepfakeMarker embedding/verification
Create src/__tests__/distribution.test.ts - tests for CrossAppDistributor registration, capability negotiation, app-specific constraints
Run pnpm install to register the new package in the workspace
Run pnpm --filter @quant/ar-lenses typecheck to confirm clean compilation
Run pnpm --filter @quant/ar-lenses test to confirm all tests pass
acceptance_criteria: packages/ar-lenses/package.json exists with @quant/ar-lenses name and standard scripts
pnpm --filter @quant/ar-lenses typecheck passes with zero errors
pnpm --filter @quant/ar-lenses test passes with all tests green
FaceTracker detects 468 landmarks and expressions from frame input
HandTrackerAR detects 21 landmarks per hand with gesture classification
BodyTracker detects 33 pose landmarks with multi-person support
Platform adapters (MediaPipe, ARKit, ARCore) normalize data to common format
Overlay engines render 2D/3D content anchored to tracking landmarks
ParticleSystem manages particle lifecycle with physics
LensSchema validates and rejects malformed lens definitions
LensRuntime enforces 16ms frame budget and sandbox constraints
EffectPipeline chains effects and short-circuits on tracking loss
PromptToLens maps natural language to valid lens schema
AgeGate blocks mature content for minor users
ConsentManager maintains audit trail of consent decisions
DeepfakeMarker embeds C2PA-compatible provenance in AR content
CrossAppDistributor supports all 4 target apps with capability negotiation
verification: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && pnpm install && pnpm --filter @quant/ar-lenses typecheck
findings: All 103 tests pass across 6 test files. Typecheck clean. Pre-commit hook requires nvm sourcing for PATH. Commit message max length is 100 chars.
